title: Java Garbage Collection
notes: Generational GC (Eden, Survivor, Tenured), JVM heap spaces, and collector algorithms (G1, ZGC).

title: Multithreading & Concurrency
notes: Thread creation, synchronized blocks, volatile keyword, locks, and ExecutorService.

title: Java Streams API
notes: Functional programming in Java using streams: filter, map, collect, reduce, and lazy evaluation.

title: JVM Memory Model (Stack vs. Heap)
notes: Stack stores primitive values and references. Heap stores object allocations. Pass-by-value semantics.
